case_title: ALBERT HSIEH VS. LEONARD JEAN GORDON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HSIEH, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, LEONARD JEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-04-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-28-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED JAN-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, LEONARD JEAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSIEH, ALBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, LEONARD JEAN $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. FILED BY DEFENDANT GORDON, LEONARD JEAN
